params.value: SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, Name, StageName, CloseDate, LastActivityDate, AccountId, Account.Name, Winback_Pilot__c FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = false AND (Winback_Pilot__c > 0 OR Account.Bookings_last_12_months__c = 0) AND RecordType.Name != 'Customer Self Service' AND OwnerId IN ('0059L000000JKG9QAO','005W7000000zmHSIAY','005W7000005SxezIAC','005W7000009NCmTIAW','0051v00000BjKXAAA3','0059L000000JKFlQAO','005W7000005SzP3IAK','005W7000005SxQTIA0','005W7000004vQt7IAE','005W7000005WNTFIA4','0059L000000IlsvQAC','0059L000000JKGDQA4','005W7000002HR5tIAG','005W70000048JRNIA2','005W7000003UovJIAS','0059L000000JKGOQA4','005W7000004vQptIAE') ORDER BY OwnerId LIMIT 1000
